RAILS_MASTER_KEY.description: Master key for Rails credentials. Found in config/master.key (never commit this file).

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for the HR Query Engine (NL-to-Filters feature)

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key for S3 file storage (avatars). Required unless STORAGE_SERVICE=local.

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret key for S3 file storage

AWS_REGION.description: AWS region for S3 bucket (default: eu-west-3)

AWS_S3_BUCKET.description: S3 bucket name for file uploads

STORAGE_SERVICE.description: Active Storage service: 'amazon' (default, requires AWS vars) or 'local' (ephemeral, dev only)

RAILS_MAX_THREADS.description: Puma thread count and DB pool size (default: 5)

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: Puma worker processes (default: 1 for Standard-1X with 512MB RAM)

JOB_CONCURRENCY.description: Solid Queue worker processes for default queue

ACCRUAL_CONCURRENCY.description: Solid Queue worker processes for accruals queue
